text: 28 Event-Driven Architecture @ it © s * No constant running or waiting for things e Producers generate events when something happens e .. clicks, errors, criteria met, uploads, actions e Events are delivered to consumers e .. actions are taken & the system returns to waiting * Mature event-driven architecture only consumes resources while handling events (serverless .... More on this soon)
